# @mgwilt/nx-uv

> Nx plugin for uv workflows in Nx monorepos.

Important notes:

- The package is currently pre-v1 and published on the npm beta dist-tag.

## Getting Started

- [README](https://github.com/mgwilt/nx-uv/blob/main/README.md): Primary user-facing documentation for installation, generators, executors, and integration templates.

## Docs

- [Documentation Index](https://github.com/mgwilt/nx-uv/blob/main/docs/index.md): Documentation entrypoint with links for plugin users and maintainers.
- [Samples Overview](https://github.com/mgwilt/nx-uv/blob/main/samples/README.md): Auto-generated sample scaffolding patterns and generation workflow.

## Optional

- [Maintainer Guide](https://github.com/mgwilt/nx-uv/blob/main/docs/maintainers.md): Repository operations, quality gates, CI workflows, badges, hooks, and prerelease process. [Maintainers]
